## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run build` passes
- [ ] `bun test` passes
- [ ] Code follows existing conventions (kebab-case files, PascalCase components)
- [ ] No hardcoded user-facing strings (use `useTranslation()` + both `en.json` and `fr.json`)
- [ ] New UI uses semantic CSS variables / Tailwind tokens (no hardcoded colors)
- [ ] Shared types added to `src/shared/types.ts` if applicable
